name: Duty Beyond Death
oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature.
Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy those creatures.)

name: Reprieve
oracle_text:
Return target spell to its owner's hand.
Draw a card.
flavor_text:
"It is our responsibility, as citizens of this world, to reach out with compassion to those who are suffering."
—Margeau, Silverquill dean

name: Deduce
oracle_text: Draw a card. Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
flavor_text:
"Do not overlook the unusual, for therein often lie the keys to the unknown."
—Alquist Proft's case journal

name: Disdainful Stroke
oracle_text: Counter target spell with mana value 4 or greater.
flavor_text:
"The clever mage knows that it does not take strength to overcome the enemy, but creativity and intelligence."
—*Forces of Negation: A Study in Countermagic*

name: Force of Will
oracle_text:
You may pay 1 life and exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Counter target spell.
flavor_text:
"We must be prepared to part with things we hold dear to protect those we love."
—*A Song of Wartime*

name: Stock Up
oracle_text: Look at the top five cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.
flavor_text:
"Knowledge is infinite, but life is not. Use your time wisely."
—*The Biblioplex: An Introduction*

name: Smallpox
oracle_text: Each player loses 1 life, discards a card, sacrifices a creature of their choice, then sacrifices a land of their choice.
flavor_text:
"One plane's poison is another's miracle cure. One plane's deadly plague is another's common cold. An interplanar medical body could save an unfathomable number of lives."
—Lisette, Witherbloom dean

name: Vampiric Tutor
oracle_text: Search your library for a card, then shuffle and put that card on top. You lose 2 life.
flavor_text:
"The only true immortality comes in the passage of knowledge. Mold one mind and you can live in thousands more."
—*The Sanguine Influence*

name: Subterranean Tremors
oracle_text: Subterranean Tremors deals X damage to each creature without flying. If X is 4 or more, destroy all artifacts. If X is 8 or more, create an 8/8 red Lizard creature token.
flavor_text:
"There is one beast that makes even titans quail and quake in fear. We shall not name it here, for to name it is to call it."
—*A History of Ruinations*

name: Giant Growth
oracle_text: Target creature gets +3/+3 until end of turn.
flavor_text:
"If you make a mistake when calculating your spell's output, please use the emergency spelltrap nets."
—Posting inside Quandrix spell labs

name: Triumph of the Hordes
oracle_text: Until end of turn, creatures you control get +1/+1 and gain trample and infect. (Creatures with infect deal damage to creatures in the form of -1/-1 counters and to players in the form of poison counters.)

Creatures you control gain indestructible until end of turn. Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy those creatures.)

printed_text: あなたのライブラリーの一番上にあるカード５枚を見る。そのうち２枚をあなたの手札に、残りをあなたのライブラリーの一番下に望む順番で置く。
flavor_text:
「知識は無限だが、人生はそうはいかない。自分の時間 を賢く使うこと。」
———「大図書棟:序文」
